briefs.title: BC Parks campsite fees raised and non-resident surcharge introduced, effective January 30
briefs.summary: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation amended to raise campsite fee ceilings (day-use to $51, backcountry to $25) and add a new $5–$30 surcharge per use for non-BC residents across all park facility types.
briefs.action_required: Update pricing displays, booking systems, and staff training to reflect new fee ranges and non-resident surcharges.

key_dates.label: BC Parks Recreation User Fees Regulation amendments take effect

briefs.industries: Natural Resources, Hotel & Accommodation, Transportation & Logistics
